---
title: "John Yonge"
---

## John Yonge

**Dates:** (18 Dec 1864-26 May 1946)

### Description

cousin of CMY, eldest son of Rev. Duke Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

He inherited Puslinch in 1881 and married (1899) Vera Vaughan Holberton.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, Oct 18th [1897[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3385_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
